mnemonics: Clarke and Cormack: The C-Core of Context and Compression
keyPoints: Pioneered research in information filtering and routing based on user profiles.
Developed the Ostensive Model of Information Retrieval, which emphasizes the user's immediate context and evolving information needs.
Made significant contributions to efficient text searching and compression algorithms for IR systems.
commonMistakes: Confusing their work with the more general Vector Space Model or Probabilistic Model, as their Ostensive Model is a distinct, user-centric approach.
Attributing the invention of full-text compression or search algorithms solely to them, as they built upon and advanced existing research in the field.
